The '''''Venturer''-class freighter''' was a [[Starship/Legends|starship]] design manufactured by [[Ckratar Crafts]]. [[Barosa Warren]]'s unique [[Starship/Legends|craft]], the ''[[Cannibal]]'', used a ''Venturer''{{'s}} hull combined with a [[Firespray-31-class patrol and attack craft/Legends|''Firespray'']] hull as its own covering.
